channel.title: fast-simple-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh fast-simple-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Simple Make-Ahead Lunch Ideas That Save Time and Taste Amazing
item.description: These make-ahead lunches are my go-to for busy weeks. Using fresh ingredients and smart prep tricks, they stay flavorful and fresh. Perfect for packing work or school meals without stress!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 20 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups cooked quinoa, cooled
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 cup feta cheese, crumbled
  • 1/4 cup kalamata olives, sliced
  • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup extra virgin olive oil
  • 2 tablespoons lemon juice
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #cherry #cucumber

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Simple Make-Ahead Lunch Ideas That Save Time and Taste Amazing
media:content.media:description: These make-ahead lunches are my go-to for busy weeks. Using fresh ingredients and smart prep tricks, they stay flavorful and fresh. Perfect for packing work or school meals without stress!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cooked, cherry, cucumber

item.title: Budget-Friendly Lunch Bowls Under $5 That Actually Taste Amazing
item.description: These lunch bowls are my go-to when I want something filling but easy on the wallet. Using simple pantry staples and a quick homemade dressing, they come together in under 30 minutes. Perfect for meal prep or busy workdays!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup dry brown rice
  • 2 cups water
  • 1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1 red bell pepper, diced
  • 1 cup corn kernels (fresh or frozen)
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon lime juice
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #brown #water #black

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Budget-Friendly Lunch Bowls Under $5 That Actually Taste Amazing
media:content.media:description: These lunch bowls are my go-to when I want something filling but easy on the wallet. Using simple pantry staples and a quick homemade dressing, they come together in under 30 minutes. Perfect for meal prep or busy workdays!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, brown, water, black

item.title: Simple and Flavorful Meal Prep Chicken Bowls That Save Time and Money
item.description: These chicken bowls are my go-to for busy weeks. Packed with colorful veggies and a tangy homemade dressing, they’re easy to make ahead and keep you fueled without breaking the bank.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, trimmed
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • 2 cups cooked brown rice
  • 1 cup steamed broccoli florets
  • 1 cup shredded carrots
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro
  • For the dressing: 3 tablespoons plain Greek yogurt
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Simple and Flavorful Meal Prep Chicken Bowls That Save Time and Money
media:content.media:description: These chicken bowls are my go-to for busy weeks. Packed with colorful veggies and a tangy homemade dressing, they’re easy to make ahead and keep you fueled without breaking the bank.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, teaspoon

item.title: Quick and Easy 5-Ingredient Dinners You Can Whip Up in Under 30 Minutes
item.description: These dinners are all about simplicity and speed without sacrificing flavor. Using just five ingredients, you can have a tasty meal on the table in under half an hour. Perfect for busy weeknights when you want something quick but satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 pound boneless chicken breasts, sliced
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/4 cup fresh basil leaves, chopped

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #pound #cherry

media:content.media:description: These dinners are all about simplicity and speed without sacrificing flavor. Using just five ingredients, you can have a tasty meal on the table in under half an hour. Perfect for busy weeknights when you want something quick but satisfying.

item.title: Easy Make-Ahead Lunch Bowls for Busy Workdays
item.description: These lunch bowls are a lifesaver on hectic mornings. Packed with fresh veggies and a tangy dressing, they come together quickly and taste great cold or warmed up. Perfect for prepping on Sundays!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 2 cups water
  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 cup red onion, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup feta cheese, crumbled
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 tablespoons lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #quinoa #water #chickpeas

media:content.media:description: These lunch bowls are a lifesaver on hectic mornings. Packed with fresh veggies and a tangy dressing, they come together quickly and taste great cold or warmed up. Perfect for prepping on Sundays!

item.title: 30 Quick Lunch Ideas Ready in 15 Minutes for Busy Days
item.description: These 30 quick lunch ideas are lifesavers when you're short on time but still want something tasty and satisfying. From fresh salads to speedy sandwiches, each recipe can be whipped up in just 15 minutes. Perfect for busy workdays or lazy weekends!

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Weeknight Chicken Stir Fry That Tastes Like Takeout
item.description: This chicken stir fry is my go-to when time’s tight but I still want something flavorful and fresh. The secret? A quick marinade and crisp veggies tossed in a simple soy-ginger sauce. Perfect for busy weeknights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce, divided
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 2 green onions, sliced
  • 1 tablespoon sesame oil
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon rice vinegar
  • Optional: sesame seeds for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #sauce #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Weeknight Chicken Stir Fry That Tastes Like Takeout
media:content.media:description: This chicken stir fry is my go-to when time’s tight but I still want something flavorful and fresh. The secret? A quick marinade and crisp veggies tossed in a simple soy-ginger sauce. Perfect for busy weeknights!

item.title: Easy No-Cook Beach Day Sandwiches That Stay Fresh and Delicious
item.description: These no-cook sandwiches are perfect for beach days when you want something fresh and fuss-free. Using crisp veggies and creamy spreads means they stay tasty without refrigeration. Great for a sunny picnic!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 slices whole grain sandwich bread, fresh
  • 4 tablespoons cream cheese, softened
  • 1 medium cucumber, thinly sliced
  • 1 medium ripe avocado, sliced
  • 1 cup alfalfa sprouts, fresh
  • 1 medium tomato, thinly sliced
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 teaspoons lemon juice

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #slices #cream #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Easy Chicken Caesar Wraps You Can Make in 15 Minutes
item.description: These chicken Caesar wraps are a quick, tasty lunch or light dinner. The creamy dressing and crisp romaine make every bite fresh, while the grilled chicken adds satisfying protein. Perfect for busy days when you want something simple but flavorful!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 5 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups cooked chicken breast, shredded or chopped
  • 1/2 cup Caesar dressing, creamy
  • 1 cup romaine lettuce, chopped
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 4 large flour tortillas
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: croutons, crushed for crunch

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #caesar #romaine

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These chicken Caesar wraps are a quick, tasty lunch or light dinner. The creamy dressing and crisp romaine make every bite fresh, while the grilled chicken adds satisfying protein. Perfect for busy days when you want something simple but flavorful!

item.title: Easy and Crowd-Pleasing Graduation Party Food Ideas That Save Time and Stress
item.description: Throwing a graduation party? These quick and tasty finger foods are lifesavers. Featuring simple make-ahead recipes and easy assembly, they keep you out of the kitchen and with your guests. Perfect for busy hosts!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 24 mini sandwich rolls, sliced
  • 12 slices deli turkey, folded
  • 12 slices cheddar cheese, halved
  • 1 cup hummus, room temperature
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, sliced thin
  • 1/2 cup fresh basil leaves
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #sandwich #slices

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Throwing a graduation party? These quick and tasty finger foods are lifesavers. Featuring simple make-ahead recipes and easy assembly, they keep you out of the kitchen and with your guests. Perfect for busy hosts!

item.title: Easy Finger Foods Perfect for Graduation Parties That Everyone Will Love
item.description: These easy finger foods are my go-to for graduation parties — simple, tasty bites that keep guests happy and mingling. Featuring a mix of crispy, cheesy, and fresh flavors, they’re perfect for casual gatherings or big celebrations.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 mini slider buns, fresh
  • 1 lb ground beef, 80% lean, cold
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese, sharp
  • 1/2 cup mayonnaise, room temperature
  • 1/4 cup ketchup
  • 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
  • 1 small red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cucumber, sliced thin
  • 2 cups baby spinach leaves, washed
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • Olive oil, for brushing

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #slider #ground #shredded

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: These easy finger foods are my go-to for graduation parties — simple, tasty bites that keep guests happy and mingling. Featuring a mix of crispy, cheesy, and fresh flavors, they’re perfect for casual gatherings or big celebrations.

item.title: Leftover Makeover: Transforming Last Night's Dinner Into a Flavor-Packed New Meal
item.description: Got leftovers? This recipe breathes new life into yesterday's dinner with fresh herbs and a quick pan sauté. It’s a simple trick that turns boring into brilliant, perfect for busy weeknights when you want something tasty but fast.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups cooked leftover protein (chicken, beef, or tofu), shredded or chopped
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup mixed fresh vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, carrots), diced
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #tablespoon #small

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Got leftovers? This recipe breathes new life into yesterday's dinner with fresh herbs and a quick pan sauté. It’s a simple trick that turns boring into brilliant, perfect for busy weeknights when you want something tasty but fast.

item.title: Quick Lunch Ideas That Beat Boring Sandwiches Every Time
item.description: Tired of the same old sandwich? These quick lunch ideas bring fresh flavors and textures with simple ingredients you probably have. Perfect for busy days when you want something tasty but fuss-free!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cooked quinoa, cooled
  • 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/2 cup canned chickpeas, rinsed and drained
  • 1/4 cup cucumber, diced
  • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Optional: 1/4 cup crumbled feta cheese

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #cherry #canned

item.title: Easy Graduation Party Finger Foods That Save You Time and Stress
item.description: These easy finger foods are a lifesaver for graduation parties. Quick to prep with simple ingredients, they let you enjoy the celebration without fuss. Perfect for casual gatherings where everyone’s mingling and snacking.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 mini slider buns, split
  • 1 pound cooked shredded rotisserie chicken
  • 1 cup BBQ sauce, divided
  • 1 cup shredded sharp cheddar cheese
  • 1/2 cup coleslaw mix
  • 1/4 cup mayonnaise
  • 1 tablespoon apple cider vinegar
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 12 dill pickle slices

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #slider #pound #sauce

item.title: Easy Crowd-Pleasing Mini Sandwiches for Graduation Parties
item.description: These mini sandwiches are my go-to for big graduation gatherings — easy to make, super tasty, and everyone loves them. I add a touch of herbed mayo for that extra zing. Perfect finger food for celebrations!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 20 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 mini sandwich rolls, fresh
  • 1/2 cup mayonnaise, room temperature
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, finely chopped
  • 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard
  • 8 ounces sliced deli turkey
  • 8 ounces sliced cheddar cheese
  • 1 small tomato, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup mixed greens, washed and dried
  • Salt and pepper, to taste

item.title: Easy Graduation Party Menu That Impresses Guests with Simple, Crowd-Pleasing Dishes
item.description: Planning a graduation party? This menu is all about easy, tasty dishes that look great and satisfy a crowd. Featuring fresh, simple ingredients and quick prep, it’s perfect for celebrating without stress.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 35 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 55 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups cooked rotisserie chicken, shredded
  • 1 cup mayonnaise, room temperature
  • 1/2 cup diced celery, fresh
  • 1/4 cup chopped green onions
  • 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 loaf crusty French bread, sliced
  • 2 cups mixed greens, washed and dried
  • 1 pint cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1/2 cup ranch dressing
  • 1 bag tortilla chips
  • 1 cup guacamole
  • 1 cup salsa

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Crowd-Pleasing Graduation Party Chicken Wings
item.description: These crispy chicken wings are a total crowd-pleaser and come together in just 30 minutes. Tossed in a tangy homemade sauce, they’re perfect for graduation parties or any casual get-together. Super simple and always a hit!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 pounds chicken wings, split and tips removed
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder (aluminum-free)
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/2 cup hot sauce (such as Frank's RedHot)
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Celery sticks and ranch dressing for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chicken #tablespoon #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These crispy chicken wings are a total crowd-pleaser and come together in just 30 minutes. Tossed in a tangy homemade sauce, they’re perfect for graduation parties or any casual get-together. Super simple and always a hit!

item.title: Easy Make-Ahead Finger Foods Perfect for Graduation Parties
item.description: These simple finger foods are a lifesaver for busy graduation days. Made ahead and packed with fresh flavors, they keep guests happy without last-minute stress. Perfect for casual celebrations or backyard parties!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 40 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 40 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 24 mini sandwich rolls, split
  • 12 slices deli turkey breast, thinly sliced
  • 12 slices deli ham, thinly sliced
  • 12 slices cheddar cheese
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 2 tablespoons Dijon mustard
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 cup baby spinach leaves
  • 1 cup sliced cucumber
  • 1 cup shredded carrot
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #sandwich #slices

media:content.media:title: Easy Make-Ahead Finger Foods Perfect for Graduation Parties
media:content.media:description: These simple finger foods are a lifesaver for busy graduation days. Made ahead and packed with fresh flavors, they keep guests happy without last-minute stress. Perfect for casual celebrations or backyard parties!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, sandwich, slices

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry That Feels Like Home
item.description: This chicken stir fry is a lifesaver on busy nights — quick, flavorful, and packed with crisp veggies. I love tossing in fresh ginger for a zing. Perfect for a cozy weekday dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce
  • 2 tablespoons honey
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons water
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Cooked jasmine rice, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry That Feels Like Home
media:content.media:description: This chicken stir fry is a lifesaver on busy nights — quick, flavorful, and packed with crisp veggies. I love tossing in fresh ginger for a zing. Perfect for a cozy weekday dinner!

item.title: Creamy One-Pot Chicken: Building Emulsion Stability and Managing Protein Moisture
item.description: A comprehensive guide to creating creamy one-pot chicken that achieves silky sauce texture without breaking the emulsion. Learn how searing develops flavor through the Maillard reaction, why room-temperature cream matters for emulsion stability, how protein denaturation determines moisture content, and the chemistry behind creating a stable, professional-quality sauce with proper technique.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 40 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs (680g) boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes
  • 3 tbsp (45g) unsalted butter, divided (2 tbsp for searing, 1 tbsp for finishing)
  • 1/2 tsp (2g) fine sea salt, divided (1/8 tsp for broccoli, 1/4 tsp for broth, adjusted at end)
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) black pepper, divided
  • 1/2 cup (120ml) chicken broth, unsalted preferred
  • 3/4 cup (180ml) heavy cream, room temperature (68-72°F / 20-22°C)
  • 2 cups (150g) fresh broccoli florets, approximately 1.5-2 inches (4-5cm) pieces
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) garlic powder
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) dried thyme
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) freshly grated nutmeg
  • 1 tbsp (8g) fresh parsley, finely chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #unsalted #divided

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy One-Pot Chicken: Building Emulsion Stability and Managing Protein Moisture
media:content.media:description: A comprehensive guide to creating creamy one-pot chicken that achieves silky sauce texture without breaking the emulsion. Learn how searing develops flavor through the Maillard reaction, why room-temperature cream matters for emulsion stability, how protein denaturation determines moisture content, and the chemistry behind creating a stable, professional-quality sauce with proper technique.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, unsalted, divided
